summary: Tested Now Playing card fix in SpotifyPlayer.js. The fix works correctly - Now Playing card shows song info (title, artist, album art) regardless of Spotify connection status. Spotify controls (play/pause/progress) only appear when connected. All backend queue APIs (add, skip, clear) working correctly. Tested on both mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x800) viewports.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/queue/add - adds song to queue successfully
Backend: GET /api/queue/current - returns correct song after add
Backend: POST /api/queue/skip - correctly advances to next song
Backend: POST /api/queue/clear - clears all songs including playing
Frontend /admin (mobile 390px): Now Playing card shows song name 'Blinding Lights' without Spotify connected
Frontend /admin (mobile 390px): Now Playing card shows artist 'The Weeknd' without Spotify connected
Frontend /admin (mobile 390px): 'Connect Spotify for playback' button shown inline when Spotify not connected
Frontend /admin (mobile 390px): Skip button advances to next song, Now Playing updates to 'Shape of You'
Frontend /admin (mobile 390px): After queue clear, Spotify connect card shown (empty queue, no Spotify)
Frontend /admin (desktop 1920px): Now Playing card shows song info without Spotify connected
Frontend /admin (desktop 1920px): 'Connect Spotify for playback' button shown inline
Frontend /request (mobile 390px): Now Playing card shows current song 'Blinding Lights'
Frontend /request (desktop 1920px): Now Playing card shows current song
Frontend /request (mobile): Search for 'love' returns song results
Frontend /request (mobile): Add song via search shows in queue tab
Service worker cache version: queueit-v2 (verified in sw.js)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all Now Playing card tests passed on both viewports)

seed_data_creation: Test songs added during testing (Blinding Lights, Shape of You, Love) - all cleared after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Now Playing card fix verified working. SpotifyPlayer.js now shows song card regardless of spotifyToken. Play/pause controls only show when spotifyToken exists. data-testid attributes: 'now-playing-card', 'now-playing-title', 'now-playing-artist' for admin, 'current-playing' for customer portal. Service worker cache version is queueit-v2. Spotify redirect URI is set to queueit.live in backend/.env.
